allOf.title: roleAssignment

description.description: Indicates the description of the role assignment. For example: 'All administrators, employees and scope tags associated with the Houston office.' Max length is 1024 characters.

displayName.description: Indicates the display name of the role assignment. For example: 'Houston administrators and users'. Max length is 128 characters.

resourceScopes.description: Indicates the list of resource scope security group Entra IDs. For example: {dec942f4-6777-4998-96b4-522e383b08e2}.

roleDefinition.description: Indicates the role definition for this role assignment.

allOf.description: The Role Assignment resource. Role assignments tie together a role definition with members and scopes. There can be one or more role assignments per role. This applies to custom and built-in roles.
